description_long: This is an adult female figure with a medium build, standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She is dressed in a fitted, sleeveless top and a knee-length skirt with a subtle texture, paired with platform shoes. Her hair is medium-length, voluminous, and layered, partially covering her face and neck. The figure's proportions and attire suggest a casual, urban style suitable for city environments. The shoes have a thick sole, and the skirt appears to have a slight sheen, indicating a synthetic or blended fabric. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall appearance is clean and stylized.
description: A casually dressed adult woman in a T-pose, wearing a sleeveless top, knee-length skirt, and platform shoes with layered, voluminous hair.
description_view_0: Front view shows the face partially obscured by hair, arms outstretched, and the full outfit including top, skirt, and shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the layered hair, and the thickness of the platform shoes.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the hair, the fit of the top and skirt, and the back of the shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, hair volume, and the side of the skirt and shoes.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless fitted top and knee-length skirt with platform shoes
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
